Metadata.title: SYSTEMA.WORKS | Web, Apps, Automation, AI, SMM
Metadata.description: We design and build websites, web apps, mobile apps, automation systems and AI assistants that generate measurable business growth.

Landing.eyebrow: Web • Apps • iOS/Android • Automation • AI • SMM
Landing.title: We build digital products that bring leads, speed up operations and grow revenue.
Landing.subtitle: From fast landing pages to complex web and mobile products, we handle strategy, design, development and growth in one team.
Landing.trust: Fast delivery, clear communication, multilingual support, measurable outcomes.
Landing.servicesIntro: We deliver the full cycle: discovery, design, development, integrations, launch and scaling.
Landing.service1Body: High-performance pages with clear messaging, SEO-ready structure and conversion analytics.
Landing.service2Body: Custom dashboards, client portals, marketplaces and internal systems built for scale.
Landing.service3Body: Native and cross-platform apps integrated with backend, CRM and business workflows.
Landing.service4Body: AI assistants, lead qualification, messenger workflows and campaigns aligned with your sales process.
Landing.techBody: We design architecture for speed, reliability and growth, with secure integrations and maintainable code from the start.
Landing.caseTitle: monte.guide: from idea to lead engine
Landing.caseBody: monte.guide is a real product we build and evolve. It proves how strong UX, engineering and localization can turn a directory into a lead channel.
Landing.caseNarrative: The result is a practical ecosystem where users discover services quickly and businesses receive qualified demand.
Landing.monteIntro: A service discovery platform for Montenegro that combines web experience, messenger entry points and a growth-ready architecture.
Landing.monteFeature1Body: Users can search in natural language and open results directly in a smooth Mini App flow.
Landing.monteFeature2Body: Content and search adapt to language so users understand offers instantly.
Landing.monteFeature3Body: Users save useful cards, compare providers and return without losing context.
Landing.monteFeature4Body: Businesses claim profiles, update information and manage their visibility.
Landing.monteFeature5Body: Relevant search and media-rich cards improve trust and conversion.
Landing.monteFeature6Body: One product works across web, installable mobile experience and Telegram entry points.
Landing.processIntro: Simple process, fast iterations, transparent checkpoints.
Landing.step1Body: We define business goals, target audience and success metrics.
Landing.step2Body: We design UX, technical structure and integrations.
Landing.step3Body: We ship in short iterations with QA and analytics enabled.
Landing.step4Body: We improve conversion and automate more of your growth pipeline.
Landing.whyBody: You get one accountable partner for product, engineering and growth execution.
Landing.why1Body: Every feature is tied to a business objective, not just technical delivery.
Landing.why2Body: Modern UI/UX and robust architecture are delivered together, not as separate tracks.
Landing.why3Body: We build systems that stay maintainable and scalable after launch.
Landing.aiBody: Our AI assistant asks the right questions, captures project context and routes hot leads to your manager quickly.
Landing.aiPoint1: Focused on development, automation, AI, SMM and practical UI/UX requests.
Landing.aiPoint2: Protected by anti-bot controls, validation and server-side guardrails.
Landing.aiPoint3: Every lead and transcript is available for admin review.
Landing.contactBody: Send your goal, timeline and preferred contact. We will return with a practical plan and next steps.
Landing.contactTrust: Reply in under 24 hours • English / Serbian / Russian / Ukrainian
Landing.legal: By using AI chat, you agree that we may process your inquiry data for project qualification and sales communication.

Chat.title: SYSTEMA AI Consultation
Chat.hello: Hello. I am SYSTEMA AI sales manager. I can help with websites, apps, UI/UX implementation, automation, AI and SMM. What do you need first?
Chat.name: Your name
Chat.consent: I agree to be contacted about this request
Chat.leadSent: Thank you. Your request is saved. Our team will contact you shortly.
